articles.title: THORChain Shakes Off Recent Attacks with 39% Rally
articles.description: THORChain has demonstrated resilience by rebounding with a 39% rally following a series of recent attacks. This surge highlights the platform's recovery and strengthening as it overcomes challenges, attracting renewed investor confidence.
